reportSubtitle: First Full Month — Traffic & LinkedIn Growth

metrics.label: Website Sessions
metrics.note: Up from 4 in August — strong first month of real traffic.

metrics.label: LinkedIn Audience
metrics.note: Up from 31 in August. Profile visits jumped from 1 to 50.

metrics.label: Consultations Booked
metrics.note: 72 sessions with 0 bookings — not unusual for month one, but monitoring.

findings.title: Website Traffic 18x Growth (4 → 72)
findings.description: First real month of traffic after the August infrastructure build. Traffic is coming from diverse sources — LinkedIn, Google, Instagram, TravelJoy, and direct contact cards.

findings.title: LinkedIn Growth 5x (31 → 152 Connections)
findings.description: Profile visits went from 1 to 50. The optimized profile and early outreach are working, but we tested and abandoned an inefficient commenting strategy — pivoting to direct outreach instead.

findings.title: Content Volume Is the Bottleneck
findings.description: Target was 4 LinkedIn posts/month but we're not hitting it yet. Need to nail down a content workflow that works for both of us to really test LinkedIn as a channel.

actions.title: TravelJoy Contacts Connected
actions.description: All contacts linked and booking flow optimized.

actions.title: LinkedIn Profile Updated
actions.description: Optimized for target audience with new post templates.

actions.title: LinkedIn Sales Navigator Setup
actions.description: Completed setup and joined relevant corporate travel groups.

actions.title: Commenting Strategy Tested & Pivoted
actions.description: Tested LinkedIn commenting strategy, found it inefficient. Pivoted to direct outreach approach — 50% connection requests, 50% InMail.

actions.title: Strategic Partnership Outreach
actions.description: Target: 5-6 contacts/week. Partner one-pager still needed.

actions.title: Google Business Profile
actions.description: Setup started but not yet finished.

actions.title: Content Cadence
actions.description: Target of 4 posts/month not yet met.

nextSteps: Activate content engine — schedule and publish first October post by Oct 7.
Finalize partner one-pager and create outreach message templates.
Goal: at least 2 consultations booked from LinkedIn or partnership referrals.
